description: Business letter from Marduk b. Musa, in Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim in Fustat. There are details on moneychanging, and the order of various commodities, mainly gems, perfumes and spices, which the writer asks Nahray to get him in Fustat. January 10th 1048 (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #534) LB see also Goitein Nachlass material
description_he: מכתב עסקי ממרדוך בן מוסא, אלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, 10 בינואר 1048, על המרת כספים וסחורות שונות
